zh.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys是Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan的兒子，於1135年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根阿凡。他與Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1208年4月在英國威爾斯享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys是Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan的儿子，于1135年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根阿凡。他与Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1208年4月在英国威尔斯享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Caradoc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Respelling of Caradog, an ancient Celtic name apparently derived from the root cār ‘love’. This name was borne by a British chieftain of the 1st century ad in the Latinized form Caractacus, son of Cunobelinos.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Powys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powis
meanings: Welsh (now mainly West Midlands of England): habitational name from the region of Powis in mid Wales (from Old Welsh powes ‘country dwellers’).

en.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys was born in 1135, in Afan, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan. He married Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in April 1208, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys est né en 1135, à Afan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1208, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys wurde 1135 in Afan, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan geboren. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1208 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys è nato il nel 1135 nel Afan, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel aprile 1208, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powysは1135年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンアファンでCaradoc ap Iestyn of Afanの息子として生まれた。イギリスウェールズでGwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Iforと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1208年4月にイギリスウェールズで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys(은)는 1135년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 아펀에서 Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1208년 4월 영국 웨일스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys nasceu em 1135, em Afan, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1208, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys родился в 1135 г. в местности афань, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1208 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys nació en 1135, en Afan, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Caradoc ap Iestyn of Afan. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en abril de 1208, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
